hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.command // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *"/jamie_job_hunt/"* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *"resume"* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *"jamie/"* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *"resume_bank"* ]]; then cd /Users/jamiecheng/jamie_job_hunt && eval "$(/opt/homebrew/bin/brew shellenv zsh)" && git add -A && CHANGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | head -5 | tr '\n' ' ') && if [[ -n "$CHANGED" ]]; then git commit -m "Auto-sync: update $CHANGED($(date +%Y-%m-%d))" && git push origin main; fi; fi 2>/dev/null || true
